column1: # SOLV pool-write manifest — the reviewed registry of every mutation of the game's
# counted ETH-obligation terms and every call of their canonical mutator helpers.
# The counted terms are exactly the obligation set the protocol totals in
# This enumeration was proven COMPLETE at review time: every sub-pool is carved
# from a counted term or holds no wei.
# This manifest is the drift gate that keeps that proof true: a new/moved site
# that mutates a counted term (or calls a canonical mutator) must be classified
# here, forcing the provenance question (paired? backed? relabel?) on review.
# CLASS semantics (the reviewed judgement; the gate does not re-derive it):
#   MUTATOR-DEF  canonical helper definition / the raw write inside its body
#   VALUE-IN     term rises backed by value arriving in the same flow
#                (msg.value, stETH pull, or recognized yield surplus)
#   VALUE-OUT    term falls as value leaves (withdrawal, payout, cross-contract
#                handoff re-counted on the receiving side)
#   POOL-TO-POOL redistribution among counted terms (relabels, freeze folds,
#                budget carves) — the obligation SUM is preserved
#   PAIRED-CREDIT per-player ledger credit whose aggregate move is paired at the
#                same site or folded once by the caller (claimablePool == Σ halves)
#   PRE-COUNTED  per-player credit whose aggregate entered claimablePool at an
#                earlier site (decimator/BAF rounds counted at snapshot)
#   DRAIN-ZERO   game-over drain / final-sweep zeroing (terminal collapse)
# Matching key: IDENTIFIER|FUNCTION|FILE|MODE (line numbers deliberately absent —
# they drift; multiple same-key sites in one function share one row and the
# rationale says so). TRACKED_SET must equal the check script's identifier list.

# TRACKED_SET: claimablePool currentPrizePool prizePoolsPacked prizePoolPendingPacked yieldAccumulator _setPrizePools _setPendingPools _setCurrentPrizePool _setFuturePrizePool _addPrizeContribution _creditClaimable _addNextPrizePool _addFuturePrizePool
